layers.name: A nourishing facial cleanser that gently cleanses while maintaining the skin's natural moisture balance. Pitera™, White Willow Extract, Hydrating Agents

A nourishing facial cleanser that gently cleanses while maintaining the skin's natural moisture balance.

layers.name: A powerful yet gentle acne serum designed to target breakouts, clear clogged pores, and reduce excess oil, helping reveal smoother and healthier-looking skin. 2% Salicylic Acid, Niacinamide, Tea Tree Extract
layers.text_content:

layers.name: Common Skincare Mistakes That May Be Harming Your Skin
layers.text_content: Common Skincare Mistakes That May Be Harming Your Skin

layers.name: A simple skincare routine is often more effective than using many products at once. By focusing on the essentials and staying consistent, you can maintain healthy and balanced skin.
layers.text_content: A simple skincare routine is often more effective than using many products at once. By focusing on the essentials and staying consistent, you can maintain healthy and balanced skin.

layers.name: How to Build a Simple Skincare Routine That Actually Works
layers.text_content: How to Build a Simple Skincare Routine That Actually Works

layers.name: Benefits of a Simple Routine Maintains healthy skin. Prevents dehydration and irritation. Supports long-term skin health. Suitable for most skin types.
layers.text_content:
Benefits of a Simple Routine
 Maintains healthy skin.
 Prevents dehydration and irritation.
 Supports long-term skin health.
 Suitable for most skin types.

layers.name: Key Tips Choose products that match your skin type. Introduce new products gradually. Avoid using too many active ingredients at once. Be patient and consistent with your routine.
layers.text_content:
Key Tips
 Choose products that match your skin type.
 Introduce new products gradually.
 Avoid using too many active ingredients at once.
 Be patient and consistent with your routine.

layers.name: Essential Products Cleanser: Removes dirt, oil, and impurities. Moisturizer: Keeps the skin hydrated and supports the skin barrier. Sunscreen: Protects against UV damage and premature aging.
layers.text_content:
Essential Products
Cleanser: Removes dirt, oil, and impurities.
Moisturizer: Keeps the skin hydrated and supports the skin barrier.
Sunscreen: Protects against UV damage and premature aging.
